response.original_title: D-Day: The Day That Won the War
response.overview: Return to the most fateful day in the dramatic history of World War II. 6th June 1944 was Operation Overlord, the Normandy landings, D-Day...it was all or nothing and one of the biggest strategic gambles ever to be undertaken but it was a gamble that paid off and became the most decisive victory for the allied forces.
response.title: D-Day: The Day That Won the War
